title: Misc Additions
description: Adds Battle axes, some music discs, lapis and redstone armor and a few other things.
body:
Miscellaneous Additions

Have you ever wanted to play minecraft with a light-weight mod, that still feels like vanilla, but has some upgrades to it? Because now, you can!
Miscellaneous Additions is a fabric mod that adds random things to the game and also changes some stuff.

This mod currently adds:
Battleaxes, Crushed Diamond, a lot of music discs, Corn (yes, popcorn too:), Sweet Berries Cookie, Copper Doors & Trapdoors (but different), End Relay, Gunpowder Barrel, Citrine (geode too), Azalea Wood set, Golden chain, lantern and soul lantern, Redstone & Lapis equipment, Golden Chainmail armor, crafting of Chainmail Armor and modifies crafting of cookies & cake and also equips Trader Llamas with chest and loot (so they are not that useless).

Click me to see more!

End Relay

End Relay is a very reliable way to travel in the End. This block works like a waystone, so this is a perfect way of travelling in the End.
Oh, and don't forget that it explodes in any other dimension!

This is an idea by Kenadain The Catboy.


Battleaxes

Battleaxes are an interesting addition to the arsenal, offering significant damage. However, their strength comes at the cost of an extended charging time. If this is not enought, there's also a 1 in 15 chance that a struck opponent will be momentarily blinded for one second. The balance of power and risk makes wielding these battleaxes a great tactical choice.

Music Discs

New music discs made by Laudividni and T_en_M are waiting for you, scattered all across the three Minecraft dimensions.
These discs are a small fun collectible additions to the game and they also sound better than the vanilla ones, so I recommend throwing a party with them!

Redstone & Lapis equipment

Redstone and Lapis equipment is upgraded netherite. These equipments do, what is characteristic for the material they are made out of. For instance lapis is a magical armor providing more luck when enchating and the redstone one does bonus damage, when it's charged.



And much more things to discover yourself!

So what are you waiting for?
Oh, are you still not convinced? Read the mod's wiki to see the full list of features.


Credits

Music discs are made by Laudividni and T_en_M
Some of the textures are made by BetterVanillaBuilding
